<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate

$0Cost$ = 8250
$1Cost$ = 3250
$2Cost$ = 7500
$3Cost$ = 20000
$4Cost$ = 35000
$5Cost$ = 75000
$PVP-0Cost$ = 4000
$PVP-1Cost$ = 1000
$PVP-2Cost$ = 2750
$PVP-3Cost$ = 9000
$PVP-4Cost$ = 20000
$PVP-5Cost$ = 42500

$1Hidden$ = true
$4Lead$ = true
$PVP-2Lead$ = true

$1Upgrade$ = Radar
$1UpgradeI$ = File:Radar.png
$2Upgrade$ = Stronger Ammunition
$2UpgradeI$ = File:Radar.png
$3Upgrade$ = Dual Turret
$3UpgradeI$ = File:Turret3.png
$4Upgrade$ = Even Heavier Ammo
$4UpgradeI$ = File:Turret4.png
$5Upgrade$ = Even Heavier Ammo
$4UpgradeI$ = File:Turret5.png
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!DPS
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|20
|0.4
|15
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|20
|0.3
|20
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|30
|0.3
|20
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|40
|0.16
|22
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|65
|0.16
|24
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|5
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|78
|0.12
|27
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!DPS
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|10
|0.35
|16.5
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|10
|0.3
|21
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|15
|0.3
|21
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|15
|0.15
|23
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|32
|0.15
|24.5
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|5
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|55
|0.12
|26.5
|$DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
